fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description for the routing header.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the routing card was last modified.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of this routing.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies in which order operations in the routing are performed.

fields.name: Version Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series you want to use to create a new version of this routing.
